hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\b.*\bcommit\b'; then STAGED_HTML=$(git -C /Users/rayhaanalykhan/Documents/helper-tool diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(html|js)$' | grep -v 'changelog\.js' || true); if [ -n "$STAGED_HTML" ] && ! git -C /Users/rayhaanalykhan/Documents/helper-tool diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'changelog\.js'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Before committing: update TOOL_CHANGELOG in changelog.js with human-friendly New/Improved/Fixed release notes based on staged changes (git diff --cached), then git add changelog.js, then retry the commit."}'; fi; fi
